title: solanum melongena var. inerme
intro: Solanum melongena var. inerme, also known as the eggplant, is a variety of the plant Solanum melongena that has a smooth skin. The leaves and fruits of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Solanum melongena var. inerme include reducing the risk of heart disease and certain cancers, as well as improving digestion and lowering blood pressure. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to extract its medicinal compounds.
